content.thinking:
The user is asking me to perform a system health check as May (the core controller). This is a scheduled cron job that needs me to:
1. Check OpenClaw Gateway status
2. Check installed skills status
3. Check disk space and system resources
4. Generate a concise health report to send to the user

Let me start by running the necessary commands to gather this information.

arguments.command: wmic logicaldisk get size,freespace,caption 2>nul || powershell -Command "Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Select-Object Name, @{N='Free(GB)';E={[math]::Round($_.Free/1GB,2)}}, @{N='Used(GB)';E={[math]::Round($_.Used/1GB,2)}}"

- Disk C: Free ~97.5GB, Used ~117GB

Let me also check the skills and gateway status properly.
